COMMENT: On October 1, 2015, the conversion from the ninth version of the International Classification of Diseases 
(ICD-9-CM) to version 10 (ICD-10-CM) occurred. ICD-10 has more than 70,000 unique diagnosis codes 
compared to approximately 14,000 ICD-9 codes, which allows for
